title: Poverty Mapping in the Age of Machine Learning

dataset_schema.label: Census and Survey Data
dataset_schema.description: Income, assets, housing quality, demographics, geographic identifiers.

dataset_schema.label: Remote Sensing Data
dataset_schema.description: Nighttime lights, vegetation indices, geographic features.

repurposed_use: Used to train machine learning models for predicting poverty at fine spatial resolution.

limitations.label: Temporal Instability
limitations.description: Census data outdated relative to real-time satellite data.

limitations.label: Selection Bias
limitations.description: Underperformance in poorest regions due to weak signal.

transformations.label: Data Integration
transformations.description: Combine survey data with satellite-derived features.

transformations.label: Aggregation
transformations.description: Align datasets to common geographic units.

transformations.label: Bias Correction
transformations.description: Adjust model outputs for systematic underestimation.

notes: Shows how ML repurposing introduces new forms of bias not captured by traditional metrics.
